name: Collect Item
desc: Shows an item being collected (picked up) by a player entity. Plays the pickup animation.

implementation.overview: Animates item collection (item entity → player). Broadcast to nearby players. No known module targets this packet in the examined client codebases (500+ folders).

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S0DPacketCollectItem)
modules.purpose: Server sends S0DPacketCollectItem to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
